query:
SELECT id, ticker, startDate, endDate, initialCapital, finalCapital, 
  ROUND(totalReturnPct, 2) AS returnPct,
  totalTrades, winRate, status, createdAt
FROM labSimulations
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
